Note: The version number in the lower right of the software title screen is still Ver.
Frame rate: Optimized for Nintendo Switch 2 for smoother movement (even when playing with 3 or more players).
HDR (High Dynamic Range) support for improved image contrast and brightness.
The frame rate has been improved, making the movement smoother."},{"url":"https://www.theshortcut.com/p/switch-2-free-upgrades-for-pokemon-mario-odyssey-and-more-detailed","title":"Switch 2 free upgrades for Pokémon Scarlet, Mario Odyssey, and more detailed","content":"Switch 2 free upgrades for Pokémon Scarlet, Mario Odyssey, and more detailed

There are also games that were in desperate need of a performance boost, specifically Pokémon Scarlet and Pokémon Violet.
I've seen some players disappointed that The Legend of Zelda: Link's Awakening and Echoes of Wisdom haven't received a frame rate boost.
The Switch 2 helps these games run at a locked 60fps, therefore a dedicated performance patch wasn't necessary.
Remember, these are free upgrades.
You don't need to pay for a Switch 2 upgrade pack like we've seen with some Nintendo Switch 2 Edition games like The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild or Metroid Prime 4: Beyond."},{"url":"https://www.resetera.com/threads/digital-foundry-switch-2-free-upgrades-for-switch-1-games-tested-links-awakening-mario-odyssey-splatoon-3-more.1230861/","title":"Link's Awakening, Mario Odyssey, Splatoon 3 +More!
